end return(function(R,n,q,A,o,K,I,f,j,m,M,H,a,U,L,Q,g,b,t,C,x,r,W,d)H,m,Q,g,U,C,x,d,r,W,b,f,t,j,a,L,M=function(R,T)local n=Q(T)local q=function(q,A,o,K,I,M,b)return C(R,{q,A;o,K,I,M,b},T,n)end return q end,-435052-(-435052),function(R)for T=119367+-119366,#R,-399876+399877 do b[R[T]]=b[R[T]]+(292802+-292801)end if q then local C=q(true)local A({},{[T(350742+-296791)]=f,[T(879648-825465)]=R,[T(-613308+667322)]=function()return-293812+-2226598 end})end end,function(R,T)local n=Q(T)local q=function(...)return C(R,{...},T,n)end return q end,function(R,T)local n=Q(T)local q=function(q,A,o,K,I)return C(R,{q,A,o,K;I},T,n)end return q end,function(C,q,A,o)local
